name: Voxelrift
description: VoxelRift is an immersive sandbox adventure where imagination reshapes reality. Explore a vibrant, cubic multiverse, bridging floating islands through boundless creativity. From majestic castles to intricate machinery, every block is yours to command. Step through the rift, master your tools, and build your legacy in a world without limits. Web Dev https://www.poki.org.es/
instructions: WASD to move Left click to remove Right click to use place a block TAB for inventory Shift to switch items in inventory B for gamemode change
